## Per-Skill Detail

### /awareness-ledger
- **Description:** Institutional memory for your project. Commands: record, consult, review. Usage: /awareness-ledger [command] [args]
- **When to use:** Capturing incidents/decisions/patterns/flows; consulting past records before a plan or change.
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `record` — record a new INC / DEC / PAT / FLW entry
  - `consult` — agent-assisted consultation before a plan/change
  - `review` — health check: stale entries, missing links, statistics
- **Lane:** UNCONFIRMED
- **Triggers:** ledger, institutional memory, incident, decision, pattern, flow, record, consult
- **Path:** .claude/skills/awareness-ledger/SKILL.md

### /code-evaluator
- **Description:** Evaluate code to prevent common AI coding mistakes — dead code, duplication, complexity hotspots, reinvented helpers, leftover scaffolding. Two functions plus a pre-write advisor. Use after writing or editing code, when asked to review code quality, clean up the codebase, find unused code, find duplicates, check complexity, or evaluate what an AI just wrote. Commands: review (post-write), sweep (full codebase).
- **When to use:** Right after writing/editing code; cleanup/dead-code/duplication/complexity requests; pre-write design decisions (advisor).
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `review` — post-write evaluation of a diff/path; tier findings; apply only HIGH-confidence, guard-cleared fixes
  - `sweep` — whole-codebase report (report-only at scale)
- **Lane:** coding (frontmatter)
- **Triggers:** code review, dead code, duplication, complexity, cleanup, unused code, evaluate code
- **Path:** .claude/skills/code-evaluator/SKILL.md

### /skill-builder
- **Description:** Create, audit, optimize Claude Code skills. Commands: skills, list, new, strip, optimize, agents, hooks, verify, inline, ledger, cascade, checksums, convert, shell-safety, route, backup, restore
- **When to use:** Creating, auditing, or optimizing Claude Code skills, or working with SKILL.md files, hooks, or agents.
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `audit` — full system audit
  - `optimize` / `agents` / `hooks` / `new` / `strip` / `route` / `backup` / `restore` / `verify` / `inline` / `ledger` / `reconcile` / `convert` / `code-eval` — see skill-builder SKILL.md
- **Lane:** UNCONFIRMED
- **Triggers:** skill, skill-builder, audit, optimize skills, hooks, agents, create skill, SKILL.md
- **Path:** .claude/skills/skill-builder/SKILL.md

### /text-eval
- **Description:** Evaluate text for AI-generated signatures (AI tells) — em-dash overuse, rhetorical colons, pipeline artifacts, hedging cadence, sycophancy leakage — before it ships. Use when reviewing, scrubbing, or finishing written/communication output. Commands: scan (mechanical), evaluate (judgment-class), scrub (bounded fix loop).
- **When to use:** Reviewing/scrubbing/finishing written or communication output for AI tells before it ships.
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `scan` — mechanical character/punctuation pass (always emits the Verification Preamble)
  - `evaluate` — mechanical scan first, then judgment-class tiers via the reasoning evaluator
  - `scrub` — bounded fix loop (Nine Scrub Principles)
- **Lane:** creative (frontmatter)
- **Triggers:** ai tells, text evaluation, em-dash, scrub, finishing, voice, proofread, ai-generated text
- **Path:** .claude/skills/text-eval/SKILL.md
